author: Ece Yildirim
title: Apple App Store Experiences Surge in New Apps Amid Vibe Coding Boom
description: After years of gradual declines, the App Store finally saw a huge jump in new apps this past year.
content:
Apple’s App Store saw 235,800 new apps in the first three months of 2026, according to new data published by The Information on Sunday, up 84% from the same time period last year.

author: Will Knight
title: AI Could Democratize One of Tech's Most Valuable Resources
description: AI is making it easier to design chips and optimize software for different silicon. Some startups envision a revolution in chipmaking.
content:
Nvidia is the undisputed king of AI chips. But thanks to the AI it helped build, the champ could soon face growing competition.

author: Martin Kaste
title: Penalties stack up as AI spreads through the legal system
description: Early scandals have not slowed lawyers' adoption of AI tools, even as court sanctions over fake legal briefs continue to rise.
content:
When it comes to using AI, it seems some lawyers just can't help themselves.
